fold2_metrics.note: Fold 2 in-sample-adjacent eval. Not canonical — use fold3_metrics for honest out-of-sample.

fold3_metrics.note: Canonical honest out-of-sample eval on fully unseen season. LR matches bookmaker baseline — no reliable edge.

confidence_guidance.note: Fold 3 (2425, n=379). Higher thresholds trade coverage for accuracy.

positioning: Bookmaker-based probability wrapper and confidence filter. Calibrates bookmaker signal into structured probabilities with a confidence tier (>=0.65). Does not show a reliable out-of-sample edge over the bookmaker baseline. Draw prediction is unresolved — draw recall is 0% in all honest post-leakage evaluations. V1 modeling closed.
leakage_note: Earlier results (65.9% acc, 56.1% draw recall) were inflated by a SQL operator-precedence bug in H2H stats that leaked future match data. Fixed 2026-04-14. All metrics in this file are clean.
notes: V1 production model. Trained on 2122+2223+2324 (1136 matches). Retrain when 2526 season data is available.
